# timeToReset

**Instance Property**

A duration in which the framework restores the group’s original state.

## Declaration

```swift
var timeToReset: Double { get }
```

## Discussion

This property determines the speed of deactivation when the app calls [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEGroupPreset/deactivate()]. The framework scales the value by [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEEngine/unitsPerSecond].

## Fading Between Settings

- **timeToTarget**: A duration in which the engine fades the settings from their original value to their new value.
